headline: Content-addressable symbolic substrate codec — the stack's join-key minter. `info` reads a container's SGL1 sha256, the one content-address every other seam tool keys on.

capabilities.label: Read a sigil container header (mint the sha256 join key)
Pack a file into a sigil container (.sgl) — writes an output file
Expand a sigil container back to the original — writes an output file
